series_metadata.series_title: Miscellaneous Grants - Both Federal and State
series_metadata.series_description: Grant criteria, applications, rejected applications, invoices, and correspondence for other Federal/State funded programs.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain digital media for 5 years after grant closeout. ; Paper: Retain paper until scanned into electronic format then destroy paper., Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Recycle
